name: OR Else: A Differentiable Trust Region for Policy Optimization

description: arXiv:2607.18163v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: PPO and the GRPO baseline studied here use clipped surrogate objectives whose favorable-direction saturation introduces an abrupt change in the scalar objective's derivative. We ask whether Output Reset (OR), a smooth one-sided saturation rule, offers a useful alternative for large language model post-training. PPO-OR and GRPO-OR replace the cli...
author: Chinmay Rane, Kanishka Tyagi, Michael Manry
